--00163630f70727ffba04628fb854 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=ISO-8859-1 Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit The package e2fsprogs, 1.41.4, is correct. I have in my laptop OpenSUSE 11.1(ext3) and FreeBSD-8-Current. The size inode this package is auto, so I no have problem in to mount the partition ext3, only I run command tune2fs in OpenSUSE. No needed changed the package e2fsprogs. -- -=-=-=-=-=-=-=- Live free or die - UNIX* -=-=-=-=-=-=-= --00163630f70727ffba04628fb854 Content-Type: text/html; charset=ISO-8859-1 Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit    
    The package e2fsprogs, 1.41.4, is correct. I have in my laptop OpenSUSE 11.1(ext3) and FreeBSD-8-Current. The size inode this package is auto, so I no have problem in to mount the partition ext3, only I run command tune2fs in OpenSUSE.
    No needed changed the package e2fsprogs.

--
-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- Live free or die - UNIX* -=-=-=-=-=-=-=
